g_text_translate.it:
Il significato dell'educazione letteraria è aiutarci a comprendere il vero significato della vita insegnando la saggezza della comprensione degli altri e della convivenza attraverso le opere. Leggendo le opere e provando il divertimento e l'emozione, gli studenti percepiscono la bellezza della vita e acquistano speranza e coraggio. Tuttavia, in questi giorni, l'educazione letteraria nelle scuole medie e superiori sta facendo percepire agli studenti la letteratura come difficile e non interessante. Sottolineando le opere e facendole memorizzare incondizionatamente, stanno rendendo gli studenti meno interessati alla letteratura. Agli studenti dovrebbe essere concesso molto tempo per leggere e pensare al lavoro e per esprimere i propri pensieri. Solo allora gli studenti potranno godere appieno della letteratura.

g_text_translate.ru:
Значение литературного образования состоит в том, чтобы помочь нам понять истинный смысл жизни, обучая мудрости понимания других и совместной жизни через произведения. Читая произведения и испытывая радость и эмоции, студенты ощущают красоту жизни и обретают надежду и смелость. Однако в наши дни литературное образование в средних и старших классах заставляет учащихся воспринимать литературу как трудную и неинтересную. Подчеркивая произведения и заставляя их безоговорочно запоминать, они снижают интерес учащихся к литературе. Студентам должно быть предоставлено достаточно времени для чтения и обдумывания работы, а также для выражения своих мыслей. Только тогда студенты смогут в полной мере насладиться литературой.

g_text_translate.hi:
साहित्य शिक्षा का महत्व दूसरों को समझने और कार्यों के माध्यम से एक साथ रहने का ज्ञान सिखाकर हमें जीवन के सही अर्थ को समझने में मदद करना है। कार्यों को पढ़कर और आनंद और भावना को महसूस करके, छात्र जीवन की सुंदरता को महसूस करते हैं और आशा और साहस प्राप्त करते हैं। हालाँकि, इन दिनों, मध्य और उच्च विद्यालयों में साहित्य शिक्षा छात्रों को साहित्य को कठिन और दिलचस्प नहीं मानने पर मजबूर कर रही है। कार्यों को रेखांकित कर उन्हें बिना शर्त कंठस्थ करा कर वे विद्यार्थियों की साहित्य के प्रति रुचि कम कर रहे हैं। छात्रों को काम के बारे में पढ़ने और सोचने और अपने विचार व्यक्त करने के लिए पर्याप्त समय दिया जाना चाहिए। तभी विद्यार्थी साहित्य का पूर्ण आनंद ले सकेंगे।

g_text_translate.tr:
Edebiyat eğitiminin önemi, başkalarını anlama ve birlikte yaşama bilgeliğini eserler aracılığıyla öğreterek, hayatın gerçek anlamını anlamamıza yardımcı olmaktır. Öğrenciler eserleri okuyarak eğlenceyi ve duyguyu hissederek hayatın güzelliklerini hisseder, umut ve cesaret kazanırlar. Ancak günümüzde ortaokul ve liselerde verilen edebiyat eğitimi, öğrencilerin edebiyatı zor ve ilgi çekici olmayan bir şey olarak algılamasına neden olmaktadır. Eserlerin altını çizerek ve kayıtsız şartsız ezberleterek öğrencilerin edebiyata olan ilgisini azaltıyorlar. Öğrencilere okumaları, çalışma hakkında düşünmeleri ve düşüncelerini ifade etmeleri için yeterli zaman verilmelidir. Ancak o zaman öğrenciler edebiyatın tadını tam anlamıyla çıkarabileceklerdir.

#######

By reading the works and feeling the fun and emotion, students feel the beauty of life and gain hope and courage. Students should be given ample time to read and think about the work and to express their thoughts. Only then will students be able to fully enjoy literature.

q_answer: 문학 교육의 목표는 독해력을 향상시키는 것이다.

explain.vi:
Chọn câu đúng với nội dung trọng tâm của bài viết.
1. Mục đích của việc giáo dục văn học là rèn luyện khả năng đọc hiểu.
2. Không được để giáo dục văn học biến chất trở thành một thuộc lòng.
3. Phải để cho học sinh tự hiểu và nhận ra giá trị của tác phẩm.
4. Phải cho học sinh nhìn lại bản thân và mơ ước về tương lai.
--------------------
스스로: Tự mình
자신: Bản thân

Bài viết cho rằng học sinh cần có thời gian tự đọc và suy nghĩ về tác phẩm rồi thể hiện suy nghĩ của bản thân, tức là cần đề cho học sinh tự hiểu về tác phẩm.
explain.en:
Choose the one that best matches the main content of the paragraph.
1. The purpose of literary education is to practice reading comprehension.
2. Do not let corrupt literary education become a memorization.
3. Students must be allowed to self-understand and realize the value of the work.
4. Students must look at themselves and dream about the future.
--------------------
<g>스스로:</g> Onself
<g>자신:</g> Onself

The paragraph argues that students need time to read and think about the work on their own and then express their thoughts, that is, it is necessary for students to understand the work themselves.
explain.fr:
Choisissez celui qui correspond le mieux au contenu principal du paragraphe.
1. Le but de l'éducation littéraire est de pratiquer la compréhension en lecture.
2. Ne laissez pas l'éducation littéraire corrompue devenir une mémorisation.
3. Les étudiants doivent être autorisés à se comprendre et à réaliser la valeur du travail.
4. Les élèves doivent se regarder et rêver de l'avenir.
--------------------
<g>스스로:</g>Soi-même
<g>자신:</g>Soi-même

Le paragraphe soutient que les élèves ont besoin de temps pour lire et réfléchir au travail par eux-mêmes, puis exprimer leurs pensées, c'est-à-dire qu'il est nécessaire que les élèves comprennent le travail eux-mêmes.

general.g_text: 평생직장 개념이 사라진 지금, 더 나은 조건을 찾아 이직하는 것은 옛 직장에 대한 ‘배신’이 아니라 자신의 성장을 위한 계기로 받아들여진다. 그렇다고 언제든, 어디로든 떠나는 게 능사는 아니다. 아무리 노력을 하더라도 기업 문화나 직속 상사와의 관계 등에서 해결책이 보이지 않는다면 떠나는 게 좋다. 회사의 보상이 불공정할 때도 이직을 고려해 볼 만하다. 자신의 가치를 인정하고 그에 따른 보상을 해 주는 조직으로 옮기는 것이 업무 성과를 끌어올릴 수 있는 길이다. 반대로 승진이나 경력을 쌓을 기회가 기대될 경우에는 당장 눈앞에 보이는 조건을 따라 이직하기보다 장기적인 안목으로 기다리는 것이 현명하다.

g_text_translate.vi: Ngày nay khái niệm "cơ quan suốt đời" đã biến mất, việc tìm một điều kiện tốt hơn và chuyển chỗ làm đã được xem như một cơ hội vì sự phát triển của bản thân hơn là "phản bội" chỗ làm cũ. Nhưng không phải vì vậy mà rời đi bất kể thời gian và nơi chuyển đến là một điều tốt. Nếu nỗ lực đến thế nào mà không thấy được cách giải quyết vấn đề văn hóa doanh nghiệp hay quan hệ với cấp trên trực thuộc thì nên rời đi. Khi công ty trả công không công bằng thì cũng nên xem xét việc rời đi. Bởi vì việc nhận thức được giá trị của bản thân và chuyển đến một tổ chức trả công xứng đáng với giá trị đó có thể mang đến thành quả trong sự nghiệp. Ngược lại trong trường hợp việc thăng tiến hay cơ hội tích lũy kinh nghiệm được trông đợi thì rõ ràng nên chờ đợi  với tầm nhìn lâu dài hơn là chuyển việc theo những điều kiện thấy ngay trước mắt.
g_text_translate.en: Now that the concept of a lifelong job has disappeared, changing jobs in search of better conditions is not regarded as a ‘betrayal’ of the old job but as an opportunity for one’s own growth. However, it is not a good idea to go anywhere, anytime. No matter how hard you try, if you do not see a solution in the corporate culture or relationship with your immediate supervisor, it is better to leave. Even when the company's compensation is unfair, it is worth considering a job change. Moving to an organization that recognizes your worth and rewards you accordingly is the way to increase your work performance. Conversely, if you are expecting a promotion or an opportunity to build a career, it is wise to wait with a long-term view rather than follow the conditions immediately in front of you.
g_text_translate.fr:
Maintenant que le concept d'emploi à vie a disparu, changer d'emploi à la recherche de meilleures conditions n'est pas considéré comme une « trahison » de l'ancien emploi, mais comme une opportunité pour sa propre croissance. Cependant, ce n'est pas une bonne idée d'aller n'importe où, n'importe quand. Peu importe vos efforts, si vous ne voyez pas de solution dans la culture d'entreprise ou la relation avec votre superviseur immédiat, il vaut mieux partir. Même lorsque la rémunération de l'entreprise est injuste, il vaut la peine d'envisager un changement d'emploi. Passer à une organisation qui reconnaît votre valeur et vous récompense en conséquence est le moyen d'augmenter votre performance au travail. A l'inverse, si vous attendez une promotion ou une opportunité de construire une carrière, il est sage d'attendre avec une vision à long terme plutôt que de suivre les conditions immédiatement devant vous.

#######

Now that the concept of a lifelong job has disappeared, changing jobs in search of better conditions is not regarded as a ‘betrayal’ of the old job but as an opportunity for one’s own growth. However, it is not a good idea to go anywhere, anytime. No matter how hard you try, if you do not see a solution in the corporate culture or relationship with your immediate supervisor, it is better to leave. Even when the company's compensation is unfair, it is worth considering a job change. Moving to an organization that recognizes your worth and rewards you accordingly is the way to increase your work performance. Conversely, if you are expecting a promotion or an opportunity to build a career, it is wise to wait with a long-term view rather than follow the conditions immediately in front of you.
g_text_translate.es:
Ahora que ha desaparecido el concepto de trabajo para toda la vida, cambiar de trabajo en busca de mejores condiciones no se considera una “traición” al antiguo trabajo sino una oportunidad para el propio crecimiento. Sin embargo, no es una buena idea ir a cualquier lugar, en cualquier momento. Por más que te esfuerces, si no ves una solución en la cultura corporativa o en la relación con tu jefe inmediato, es mejor que te vayas. Incluso cuando la compensación de la empresa es injusta, vale la pena considerar un cambio de trabajo. Pasar a una organización que reconozca su valor y lo recompense en consecuencia es la forma de aumentar su rendimiento laboral. Por el contrario, si está esperando un ascenso o una oportunidad para construir una carrera, es aconsejable esperar con una visión a largo plazo en lugar de seguir las condiciones inmediatamente frente a usted.

#######

Now that the concept of a lifelong job has disappeared, changing jobs in search of better conditions is not regarded as a ‘betrayal’ of the old job but as an opportunity for one’s own growth. However, it is not a good idea to go anywhere, anytime. No matter how hard you try, if you do not see a solution in the corporate culture or relationship with your immediate supervisor, it is better to leave. Even when the company's compensation is unfair, it is worth considering a job change. Moving to an organization that recognizes your worth and rewards you accordingly is the way to increase your work performance. Conversely, if you are expecting a promotion or an opportunity to build a career, it is wise to wait with a long-term view rather than follow the conditions immediately in front of you.
g_text_translate.id:
Sekarang konsep pekerjaan seumur hidup telah menghilang, berganti pekerjaan untuk mencari kondisi yang lebih baik tidak dianggap sebagai 'pengkhianatan' dari pekerjaan lama tetapi sebagai kesempatan untuk pertumbuhan sendiri. Namun, itu bukan ide yang baik untuk pergi ke mana saja, kapan saja. Tidak peduli seberapa keras Anda mencoba, jika Anda tidak melihat solusi dalam budaya perusahaan atau hubungan dengan atasan langsung Anda, lebih baik pergi. Bahkan ketika kompensasi perusahaan tidak adil, ada baiknya mempertimbangkan perubahan pekerjaan. Pindah ke organisasi yang mengakui nilai Anda dan memberi penghargaan yang sesuai kepada Anda adalah cara untuk meningkatkan kinerja kerja Anda. Sebaliknya, jika Anda mengharapkan promosi atau kesempatan untuk membangun karier, sebaiknya menunggu dengan pandangan jangka panjang daripada langsung mengikuti kondisi di depan Anda.

#######

Now that the concept of a lifelong job has disappeared, changing jobs in search of better conditions is not regarded as a ‘betrayal’ of the old job but as an opportunity for one’s own growth. However, it is not a good idea to go anywhere, anytime. No matter how hard you try, if you do not see a solution in the corporate culture or relationship with your immediate supervisor, it is better to leave. Even when the company's compensation is unfair, it is worth considering a job change. Moving to an organization that recognizes your worth and rewards you accordingly is the way to increase your work performance. Conversely, if you are expecting a promotion or an opportunity to build a career, it is wise to wait with a long-term view rather than follow the conditions immediately in front of you.
g_text_translate.ja:
終身雇用という概念がなくなった今、より良い条件を求めて転職することは、前職の「裏切り」ではなく、自分自身の成長の機会と捉えられています。ただし、いつでもどこでも行くのは得策ではありません。どんなに頑張っても、企業文化や直属の上司との関係に解決策が見られない場合は、辞めたほうがよいでしょう。会社の報酬が不公平な場合でも、転職を検討する価値はあります。あなたの価値を認め、それに応じて報酬を与える組織に移行することは、仕事のパフォーマンスを向上させる方法です。逆に、昇進やキャリア形成の機会を期待している場合は、目の前の状況に従うのではなく、長期的な視野で待つことが賢明です。

#######

Now that the concept of a lifelong job has disappeared, changing jobs in search of better conditions is not regarded as a ‘betrayal’ of the old job but as an opportunity for one’s own growth. However, it is not a good idea to go anywhere, anytime. No matter how hard you try, if you do not see a solution in the corporate culture or relationship with your immediate supervisor, it is better to leave. Even when the company's compensation is unfair, it is worth considering a job change. Moving to an organization that recognizes your worth and rewards you accordingly is the way to increase your work performance. Conversely, if you are expecting a promotion or an opportunity to build a career, it is wise to wait with a long-term view rather than follow the conditions immediately in front of you.
g_text_translate.de:
Nachdem das Konzept des lebenslangen Arbeitsplatzes verschwunden ist, wird ein Jobwechsel auf der Suche nach besseren Bedingungen nicht mehr als „Verrat“ am alten Job angesehen, sondern als Chance für das eigene Wachstum. Es ist jedoch keine gute Idee, jederzeit und überall hinzugehen. Egal wie sehr Sie es versuchen, wenn Sie keine Lösung in der Unternehmenskultur oder der Beziehung zu Ihrem direkten Vorgesetzten sehen, ist es besser zu gehen. Auch wenn die Vergütung des Unternehmens ungerecht ist, lohnt es sich, über einen Stellenwechsel nachzudenken. Der Wechsel zu einem Unternehmen, das Ihren Wert anerkennt und Sie entsprechend belohnt, ist der Weg, um Ihre Arbeitsleistung zu steigern. Umgekehrt, wenn Sie eine Beförderung oder die Möglichkeit erwarten, eine Karriere aufzubauen, ist es ratsam, mit einer langfristigen Perspektive zu warten, anstatt den unmittelbar vor Ihnen liegenden Bedingungen zu folgen.

#######

Now that the concept of a lifelong job has disappeared, changing jobs in search of better conditions is not regarded as a ‘betrayal’ of the old job but as an opportunity for one’s own growth. However, it is not a good idea to go anywhere, anytime. No matter how hard you try, if you do not see a solution in the corporate culture or relationship with your immediate supervisor, it is better to leave. Even when the company's compensation is unfair, it is worth considering a job change. Moving to an organization that recognizes your worth and rewards you accordingly is the way to increase your work performance. Conversely, if you are expecting a promotion or an opportunity to build a career, it is wise to wait with a long-term view rather than follow the conditions immediately in front of you.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
现在终身工作的概念已经消失，换工作寻求更好的条件已经不是对旧工作的“背叛”，而是自己成长的机会。但是，随时随地都不是一个好主意。不管你怎么努力，如果你在企业文化或与你的直接主管的关系中看不到解决方案，最好离开。即使公司的薪酬不公平，也值得考虑换工作。搬到一个认可你的价值并相应奖励你的组织是提高工作绩效的方法。相反，如果您期待升职或建立事业的机会，明智的做法是着眼长远，而不是立即遵循眼前的条件。

#######

現在終身工作的概念已經消失，換工作尋求更好的條件已經不是對舊工作的“背叛”，而是自己成長的機會。但是，隨時隨地都不是一個好主意。不管你怎麼努力，如果你在企業文化或與你的直接主管的關係中看不到解決方案，最好離開。即使公司的薪酬不公平，也值得考慮換工作。搬到一個認可你的價值並相應獎勵你的組織是提高工作績效的方法。相反，如果您期待升職或建立事業的機會，明智的做法是著眼長遠，而不是立即遵循眼前的條件。

g_text_translate.it:
Scomparso il concetto di lavoro a vita, cambiare lavoro alla ricerca di condizioni migliori non è visto come un “tradimento” del vecchio lavoro ma come un'opportunità per la propria crescita. Tuttavia, non è una buona idea andare da nessuna parte, in qualsiasi momento. Non importa quanto ci provi, se non vedi una soluzione nella cultura aziendale o nel rapporto con il tuo diretto superiore, è meglio andarsene. Anche quando il compenso dell'azienda è ingiusto, vale la pena considerare un cambio di lavoro. Trasferirsi in un'organizzazione che riconosce il tuo valore e ti premia di conseguenza è il modo per aumentare le tue prestazioni lavorative. Al contrario, se ti aspetti una promozione o un'opportunità per costruire una carriera, è saggio aspettare con una visione a lungo termine piuttosto che seguire le condizioni immediatamente di fronte a te.

#######

Now that the concept of a lifelong job has disappeared, changing jobs in search of better conditions is not regarded as a ‘betrayal’ of the old job but as an opportunity for one’s own growth. However, it is not a good idea to go anywhere, anytime. No matter how hard you try, if you do not see a solution in the corporate culture or relationship with your immediate supervisor, it is better to leave. Even when the company's compensation is unfair, it is worth considering a job change. Moving to an organization that recognizes your worth and rewards you accordingly is the way to increase your work performance. Conversely, if you are expecting a promotion or an opportunity to build a career, it is wise to wait with a long-term view rather than follow the conditions immediately in front of you.
g_text_translate.ru:
Сейчас, когда понятие «пожизненная работа» исчезло, смена места работы в поисках лучших условий рассматривается не как «предательство» старой работы, а как возможность для собственного роста. Однако идти куда угодно и когда угодно – не лучшая идея. Как бы вы ни старались, если вы не видите решения в корпоративной культуре или отношениях с непосредственным руководителем, лучше уйти. Даже если вознаграждение компании несправедливо, стоит задуматься о смене работы. Переход в организацию, которая признает вашу ценность и соответствующим образом вознаграждает вас, — это способ повысить производительность вашей работы. И наоборот, если вы ожидаете повышения по службе или возможности построить карьеру, разумно подождать с долгосрочной перспективой, а не следовать условиям, которые непосредственно перед вами.

#######

ตอนนี้แนวคิดเรื่องงานตลอดชีวิตได้หายไปแล้ว การเปลี่ยนงานเพื่อค้นหาสภาพที่ดีขึ้นไม่ถือเป็นการ "ทรยศ" งานเก่า แต่เป็นโอกาสในการเติบโตของตนเอง อย่างไรก็ตาม ไม่ควรเดินทางไปทุกที่ทุกเวลา ไม่ว่าคุณจะพยายามแค่ไหน หากคุณไม่เห็นวิธีแก้ปัญหาในวัฒนธรรมองค์กรหรือความสัมพันธ์กับหัวหน้างานทันที ก็ควรลาออกจะดีกว่า แม้ว่าค่าตอบแทนของบริษัทจะไม่ยุติธรรม แต่ก็คุ้มค่าที่จะพิจารณาเปลี่ยนงาน การย้ายไปอยู่ในองค์กรที่ตระหนักถึงคุณค่าของคุณและให้ผลตอบแทนตามนั้นเป็นวิธีเพิ่มประสิทธิภาพการทำงานของคุณ ในทางกลับกัน หากคุณคาดหวังการเลื่อนตำแหน่งหรือโอกาสในการสร้างอาชีพ ก็ควรที่จะรอด้วยมุมมองระยะยาว แทนที่จะปฏิบัติตามเงื่อนไขที่อยู่ตรงหน้าทันที

#######

Now that the concept of a lifelong job has disappeared, changing jobs in search of better conditions is not regarded as a ‘betrayal’ of the old job but as an opportunity for one’s own growth. However, it is not a good idea to go anywhere, anytime. No matter how hard you try, if you do not see a solution in the corporate culture or relationship with your immediate supervisor, it is better to leave. Even when the company's compensation is unfair, it is worth considering a job change. Moving to an organization that recognizes your worth and rewards you accordingly is the way to increase your work performance. Conversely, if you are expecting a promotion or an opportunity to build a career, it is wise to wait with a long-term view rather than follow the conditions immediately in front of you.
g_text_translate.pt:
Agora que desapareceu o conceito de emprego vitalício, mudar de emprego em busca de melhores condições não é visto como uma “traição” ao antigo emprego, mas como uma oportunidade para o próprio crescimento. No entanto, não é uma boa ideia ir a qualquer lugar, a qualquer hora. Por mais que você tente, se não vê solução na cultura corporativa ou no relacionamento com seu superior imediato, é melhor ir embora. Mesmo quando a remuneração da empresa é injusta, vale a pena considerar uma mudança de emprego. Mudar para uma organização que reconhece o seu valor e o recompensa de acordo é a maneira de aumentar o seu desempenho no trabalho. Por outro lado, se você espera uma promoção ou uma oportunidade de construir uma carreira, é aconselhável esperar com uma visão de longo prazo, em vez de seguir as condições imediatamente à sua frente.

#######

Now that the concept of a lifelong job has disappeared, changing jobs in search of better conditions is not regarded as a ‘betrayal’ of the old job but as an opportunity for one’s own growth. However, it is not a good idea to go anywhere, anytime. No matter how hard you try, if you do not see a solution in the corporate culture or relationship with your immediate supervisor, it is better to leave. Even when the company's compensation is unfair, it is worth considering a job change. Moving to an organization that recognizes your worth and rewards you accordingly is the way to increase your work performance. Conversely, if you are expecting a promotion or an opportunity to build a career, it is wise to wait with a long-term view rather than follow the conditions immediately in front of you.
g_text_translate.hi:
अब जबकि आजीवन नौकरी की अवधारणा लुप्त हो गई है, बेहतर परिस्थितियों की तलाश में नौकरी बदलना पुरानी नौकरी के साथ 'विश्वासघात' नहीं बल्कि खुद के विकास के अवसर के रूप में माना जाता है। हालाँकि, कहीं भी, कभी भी जाना अच्छा विचार नहीं है। चाहे आप कितनी भी कोशिश कर लें, अगर आपको कॉर्पोरेट संस्कृति या अपने तत्काल पर्यवेक्षक के साथ संबंधों में कोई समाधान नहीं दिखता है, तो छोड़ देना ही बेहतर है। यहां तक ​​कि जब कंपनी का मुआवज़ा अनुचित हो, तब भी नौकरी बदलने पर विचार करना उचित है। ऐसे संगठन में जाना जो आपकी योग्यता को पहचानता है और उसके अनुसार आपको पुरस्कृत करता है, आपके कार्य प्रदर्शन को बढ़ाने का तरीका है। इसके विपरीत, यदि आप पदोन्नति या करियर बनाने के अवसर की उम्मीद कर रहे हैं, तो आपके सामने तुरंत परिस्थितियों का पालन करने के बजाय दीर्घकालिक दृष्टिकोण के साथ इंतजार करना बुद्धिमानी है।

#######

Now that the concept of a lifelong job has disappeared, changing jobs in search of better conditions is not regarded as a ‘betrayal’ of the old job but as an opportunity for one’s own growth. However, it is not a good idea to go anywhere, anytime. No matter how hard you try, if you do not see a solution in the corporate culture or relationship with your immediate supervisor, it is better to leave. Even when the company's compensation is unfair, it is worth considering a job change. Moving to an organization that recognizes your worth and rewards you accordingly is the way to increase your work performance. Conversely, if you are expecting a promotion or an opportunity to build a career, it is wise to wait with a long-term view rather than follow the conditions immediately in front of you.
g_text_translate.tr:
Artık ömür boyu iş kavramı ortadan kalktığı için, daha iyi koşullar aramak amacıyla iş değiştirmek, eski işe 'ihanet' olarak değil, kişinin kendi gelişimi için bir fırsat olarak görülüyor. Ancak herhangi bir zamanda herhangi bir yere gitmek iyi bir fikir değildir. Ne kadar çabalarsanız çabalayın, kurum kültüründe veya bir üst amirinizle olan ilişkilerinizde bir çözüm göremiyorsanız, ayrılmanız daha doğru olur. Şirketin tazminatı adil olmasa bile iş değişikliğini düşünmeye değer. Değerinizi bilen ve sizi buna göre ödüllendiren bir organizasyona geçmek iş performansınızı arttırmanın yoludur. Tersine, bir terfi veya kariyer yapma fırsatı bekliyorsanız, hemen önünüzdeki koşulları takip etmek yerine uzun vadeli bir bakış açısıyla beklemek akıllıca olacaktır.

#######

Now that the concept of a lifelong job has disappeared, changing jobs in search of better conditions is not regarded as a ‘betrayal’ of the old job but as an opportunity for one’s own growth. However, it is not a good idea to go anywhere, anytime. No matter how hard you try, if you do not see a solution in the corporate culture or relationship with your immediate supervisor, it is better to leave. Even when the company's compensation is unfair, it is worth considering a job change. Moving to an organization that recognizes your worth and rewards you accordingly is the way to increase your work performance. Conversely, if you are expecting a promotion or an opportunity to build a career, it is wise to wait with a long-term view rather than follow the conditions immediately in front of you.

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 승진 기회가 주어진다면 이직을 미루는 것이 좋다.
많은 경우 이직을 하고 나면 업무 성과가 향상된다.
대부분의 사람들은 평생직장의 개념을 가지고 있다.
상사와의 갈등이나 보상 문제가 이직의 주요 원인이다.

explain.vi:
Chọn câu giống với nội dung trên.
1. Nếu được cho cơ hội thăng tiến thì nên hoãn việc chuyển việc.
2. Trong nhiều trường hợp, sau khi chuyển việc thì có được thành quả trong sự nghiệp.
3. Đa số mọi người đều có khái niệm cơ quan suốt đời.
4. Mâu thuẫn với cấp trên hay vấn đề trả công là nguyên nhân chính dẫn đến chuyển việc.
--------------------
승진: Thăng tiến
미루다: Trì hoãn, đẩy lùi
기다리다: Chờ đợi

반대로 승진이나 경력을 쌓을 기회가 기대될 경우에는 당장 눈앞에 보이는 조건을 따라 이직하기보다 장기적인 안목으로 기다리는 것이 현명하다:  Ngược lại trong trường hợp việc thăng tiến hay cơ hội tích lũy kinh nghiệm được trông đợi thì rõ ràng nên chờ đợi  với tầm nhìn lâu dài hơn là chuyển việc theo những điều kiện thấy ngay trước mắt.
explain.en:

2. In many cases, after changing jobs, there are career achievements.

3. Most people have the concept of a lifetime job.
4. Conflict with superiors or compensation problem is the main reason leading to job change.
--------------------
<g>승진:</g> Promotion
<g>미루다:</g> To delay
<g>기다리다:</g> To wait

explain.hi:
वह चुनें जो इस अनुच्छेद की सामग्री से मेल खाता हो।
1. यदि आपको पदोन्नति का अवसर दिया जाए तो आपको नौकरी परिवर्तन को स्थगित कर देना चाहिए।
2. कई मामलों में नौकरी बदलने के बाद करियर में उपलब्धियां मिलती हैं.
3. अधिकांश लोगों के मन में जीवन भर नौकरी की अवधारणा होती है।
4. वरिष्ठों से टकराव या मुआवज़े की समस्या नौकरी बदलने का मुख्य कारण है।
------------------------

<g>기다리다:</g>प्रतीक्षा करना

general.g_text: 오늘날 의학이나 과학 분야에서 이루어낸 놀라운 성과는 실험동물의 희생이 있었기에 가능했다고 해도 과언이 아니다. 그만큼 실험동물이 인류의 발전에 기여한 바가 크다고 할 수 있다. 그러나 다른 한편에서는 동물의 생명도 존엄하다는 사회적 인식이 확산되면서 동물 실험이 비윤리적임을 주장하는 목소리가 높아졌다. 이러한 인식 변화에 발맞추어 실험동물에 관한 법률이 마련되었고 매년 그들의 희생을 기리는 위령제가 열리게 되었다. 하지만 실험동물의 생명이 존엄하다고 해서 지금 당장 동물 실험을 중단할 수는 없다. 현재 진행되고 있는 난치병 치료 연구나 신약 개발 등에 막대한 지장을 초래할 것이 분명하기 때문이다. (        ) 앞으로도 실험동물들의 희생은 어쩔 수 없어 보인다.

g_text_translate.vi: Không quá lời khi nói rằng thành quả đáng ngạc nhiên đạt được trong lĩnh vực y học hay khoa học ngày nay có được là nhờ sự hy sinh của những động vật thí nghiệm. Vì vậy, có thể nói động vật thí nghiệm có đóng góp to lớn và sự phát triển của nhân loại. Tuy  nhiên ở mặt khác, ý kiến mang tầm xã hội rằng sinh mạng của động vật cũng quý giá đang được lan rộng, ý kiến cho rằng thí nghiệm động vật là phi đạo đức cũng ngày càng nhiều. Để theo kịp sự thay đổi nhận thức này, luật liên quan đến động vật thí nghiệm cũng đã được xây dựng và lễ tưởng niệm để tưởng nhớ động vật thí nghiệm cũng được mở ra. Thế nhưng không thể nói rằng sinh mạng của động vật là cao quý nên ngừng thí nghiệm trên động vật ngay bây giờ được. Bởi vì nó sẽ gây ra trở ngại to lớn cho nghiên cứu cách điều trị bệnh nan ý hay phát triển thuốc mới hiện đang được tiến hành.  (        ) có vẻ sau này cũng không thể làm gì hơn với sự hy sinh của động vật thí nghiệm.
g_text_translate.en: It is no exaggeration to say that the amazing achievements achieved in the fields of medicine and science today were made possible by the sacrifice of experimental animals. It can be said that experimental animals have contributed greatly to the development of mankind. However, on the other hand, as the social awareness that animal life is also dignified has spread, voices arguing that animal testing is unethical have increased. In line with this change in perception, the Act on Experimental Animals was prepared, and a memorial service was held every year to commemorate their sacrifice. However, just because the life of laboratory animals is dignified does not mean that animal experiments should be stopped immediately. This is because it is clear that it will cause a huge hindrance to the ongoing research on treatment of incurable diseases or the development of new drugs. Until there is a way to replace animal testing, sacrifice of experimental animals seems inevitable in the future.
g_text_translate.fr:
Il n'est pas exagéré de dire que les réalisations étonnantes réalisées dans les domaines de la médecine et de la science aujourd'hui ont été rendues possibles grâce au sacrifice d'animaux expérimentaux. On peut dire que les animaux de laboratoire ont grandement contribué au développement de l'humanité. Cependant, d'un autre côté, à mesure que la conscience sociale que la vie animale est également digne s'est répandue, les voix affirmant que l'expérimentation animale est contraire à l'éthique se sont multipliées. Conformément à ce changement de perception, la loi sur les animaux d'expérimentation a été préparée et un service commémoratif a été organisé chaque année pour commémorer leur sacrifice. Cependant, ce n'est pas parce que la vie des animaux de laboratoire est digne que les expérimentations animales doivent être arrêtées immédiatement. En effet, il est clair que cela entravera considérablement les recherches en cours sur le traitement des maladies incurables ou le développement de nouveaux médicaments. Jusqu'à ce qu'il y ait un moyen de remplacer l'expérimentation animale, le sacrifice d'animaux de laboratoire semble inévitable à l'avenir.

#######

It is no exaggeration to say that the amazing achievements achieved in the fields of medicine and science today were made possible by the sacrifice of experimental animals. It can be said that experimental animals have contributed greatly to the development of mankind. However, on the other hand, as the social awareness that animal life is also dignified has spread, voices arguing that animal testing is unethical have increased. In line with this change in perception, the Act on Experimental Animals was prepared, and a memorial service was held every year to commemorate their sacrifice. However, just because the life of laboratory animals is dignified does not mean that animal experiments should be stopped immediately. This is because it is clear that it will cause a huge hindrance to the ongoing research on treatment of incurable diseases or the development of new drugs. Until there is a way to replace animal testing, sacrifice of experimental animals seems inevitable in the future.
g_text_translate.es:
No es exagerado decir que los asombrosos logros alcanzados en los campos de la medicina y la ciencia hoy en día fueron posibles gracias al sacrificio de animales de experimentación. Se puede decir que los animales de experimentación han contribuido en gran medida al desarrollo de la humanidad. Sin embargo, por otro lado, a medida que se ha extendido la conciencia social de que la vida animal también es digna, han aumentado las voces que argumentan que la experimentación con animales no es ética. En consonancia con este cambio de percepción, se elaboró ​​la Ley de Animales de Experimentación y cada año se celebraba un servicio conmemorativo para conmemorar su sacrificio. Sin embargo, el hecho de que la vida de los animales de laboratorio sea digna no significa que los experimentos con animales deban detenerse de inmediato. Esto se debe a que está claro que causará un gran obstáculo para la investigación en curso sobre el tratamiento de enfermedades incurables o el desarrollo de nuevos medicamentos. Hasta que no haya una forma de reemplazar las pruebas con animales, el sacrificio de animales de experimentación parece inevitable en el futuro.

#######

It is no exaggeration to say that the amazing achievements achieved in the fields of medicine and science today were made possible by the sacrifice of experimental animals. It can be said that experimental animals have contributed greatly to the development of mankind. However, on the other hand, as the social awareness that animal life is also dignified has spread, voices arguing that animal testing is unethical have increased. In line with this change in perception, the Act on Experimental Animals was prepared, and a memorial service was held every year to commemorate their sacrifice. However, just because the life of laboratory animals is dignified does not mean that animal experiments should be stopped immediately. This is because it is clear that it will cause a huge hindrance to the ongoing research on treatment of incurable diseases or the development of new drugs. Until there is a way to replace animal testing, sacrifice of experimental animals seems inevitable in the future.
g_text_translate.id:
Tidak berlebihan untuk mengatakan bahwa pencapaian luar biasa yang dicapai di bidang kedokteran dan sains saat ini dimungkinkan oleh pengorbanan hewan percobaan. Dapat dikatakan bahwa hewan percobaan telah memberikan kontribusi yang besar bagi perkembangan umat manusia. Namun, di sisi lain, ketika kesadaran sosial bahwa kehidupan hewan juga bermartabat telah menyebar, suara-suara yang menyatakan bahwa pengujian hewan tidak etis telah meningkat. Sejalan dengan perubahan persepsi tersebut, maka disusunlah Undang-Undang tentang Hewan Percobaan, dan setiap tahun diadakan upacara peringatan untuk memperingati pengorbanan mereka. Namun, hanya karena kehidupan hewan laboratorium bermartabat tidak berarti eksperimen hewan harus segera dihentikan. Hal ini karena jelas akan menyebabkan hambatan besar bagi penelitian yang sedang berlangsung tentang pengobatan penyakit yang tidak dapat disembuhkan atau pengembangan obat baru. Sampai ada cara untuk menggantikan hewan uji, pengorbanan hewan percobaan tampaknya tak terelakkan di masa depan.

#######

g_text_translate.ja:
今日の医学や科学の驚くべき成果は、実験動物の犠牲によって可能になったといっても過言ではありません。実験動物は人類の発展に大きく貢献してきたと言えます。しかし一方で、動物の命も尊厳を重んじる社会的認識が広まるにつれ、動物実験は非倫理的であると主張する声が高まっています。こうした認識の変化に伴い、実験動物法が制定され、犠牲者を追悼するための追悼式が毎年行われました。しかし、実験動物の命に尊厳があるからといって、動物実験をすぐにやめるべきだというわけではありません。現在進行中の難病治療の研究や新薬開発に大きな支障をきたすことが明らかだからです。動物実験に代わる方法ができるまで、実験動物の犠牲は避けられないようです。

#######

However, just because the life of laboratory animals is dignified does not mean that animal experiments should be stopped immediately. Until there is a way to replace animal testing, sacrifice of experimental animals seems inevitable in the future.
g_text_translate.de:
Es ist keine Übertreibung zu sagen, dass die erstaunlichen Leistungen, die heute in Medizin und Wissenschaft erzielt werden, durch die Opferung von Versuchstieren ermöglicht wurden. Man kann sagen, dass Versuchstiere einen großen Beitrag zur Entwicklung der Menschheit geleistet haben. Andererseits haben sich mit der Verbreitung des gesellschaftlichen Bewusstseins, dass auch das Leben von Tieren würdevoll ist, Stimmen gehäuft, die argumentieren, dass Tierversuche unethisch sind. Im Einklang mit dieser veränderten Wahrnehmung wurde das Versuchstiergesetz vorbereitet und jedes Jahr eine Gedenkfeier zum Gedenken an ihre Opferung abgehalten. Doch nur weil das Leben von Versuchstieren würdig ist, heißt das nicht, dass Tierversuche sofort eingestellt werden sollten. Denn es ist klar, dass dies die laufende Forschung zur Behandlung unheilbarer Krankheiten oder die Entwicklung neuer Medikamente stark behindern wird. Bis es einen Weg gibt, Tierversuche zu ersetzen, scheint das Töten von Versuchstieren in Zukunft unvermeidlich.

#######

It is no exaggeration to say that the amazing achievements achieved in the fields of medicine and science today were made possible by the sacrifice of experimental animals. It can be said that experimental animals have contributed greatly to the development of mankind. However, on the other hand, as the social awareness that animal life is also dignified has spread, voices arguing that animal testing is unethical have increased. In line with this change in perception, the Act on Experimental Animals was prepared, and a memorial service was held every year to commemorate their sacrifice. However, just because the life of laboratory animals is dignified does not mean that animal experiments should be stopped immediately. This is because it is clear that it will cause a huge hindrance to the ongoing research on treatment of incurable diseases or the development of new drugs. Until there is a way to replace animal testing, sacrifice of experimental animals seems inevitable in the future.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
毫不夸张地说，今天医学和科学领域所取得的惊人成就，都是由于实验动物的牺牲而成为可能的。可以说，实验动物为人类的发展做出了巨大贡献。然而，另一方面，随着动物生命也有尊严的社会意识的传播，认为动物试验不道德的声音有所增加。为配合这种观念的转变，制定了《实验动物法》，并每年举行追悼会，以纪念他们的牺牲。但是，仅仅因为实验动物的生命有尊严，并不意味着应该立即停止动物实验。这是因为很明显，这将对正在进行的治疗疑难杂症的研究或新药的开发造成巨大的阻碍。除非有办法替代动物试验，否则牺牲实验动物似乎在未来是不可避免的。

#######

Until there is a way to replace animal testing, sacrifice of experimental animals seems inevitable in the future.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
毫不誇張地說，今天醫學和科學領域所取得的驚人成就，都是由於實驗動物的犧牲而成為可能的。可以說，實驗動物為人類的發展做出了巨大貢獻。然而，另一方面，隨著動物生命也有尊嚴的社會意識的傳播，認為動物試驗不道德的聲音有所增加。為配合這種觀念的轉變，制定了《實驗動物法》，並每年舉行追悼會，以紀念他們的犧牲。但是，僅僅因為實驗動物的生命有尊嚴，並不意味著應該立即停止動物實驗。這是因為很明顯，這將對正在進行的治療疑難雜症的研究或新藥的開發造成巨大的阻礙。除非有辦法替代動物試驗，否則犧牲實驗動物似乎在未來是不可避免的。

In line with this change in perception, the Act on Experimental Animals was prepared, and a memorial service was held every year to commemorate their sacrifice. However, just because the life of laboratory animals is dignified does not mean that animal experiments should be stopped immediately. This is because it is clear that it will cause a huge hindrance to the ongoing research on treatment of incurable diseases or the development of new drugs. Until there is a way to replace animal testing, sacrifice of experimental animals seems inevitable in the future.
g_text_translate.it:
Non è esagerato affermare che gli straordinari risultati raggiunti oggi nei campi della medicina e della scienza sono stati resi possibili dal sacrificio di animali da esperimento. Si può dire che gli animali da esperimento hanno contribuito notevolmente allo sviluppo dell'umanità. Tuttavia, d'altra parte, con il diffondersi della consapevolezza sociale che anche la vita animale è dignitosa, sono aumentate le voci che sostengono che la sperimentazione animale non è etica. In linea con questo cambiamento di percezione, è stata preparata la legge sugli animali da esperimento e ogni anno si è tenuta una funzione commemorativa per commemorare il loro sacrificio. Tuttavia, solo perché la vita degli animali da laboratorio è dignitosa non significa che gli esperimenti sugli animali debbano essere interrotti immediatamente. Questo perché è chiaro che causerà un enorme ostacolo alla ricerca in corso sulla cura di malattie incurabili o allo sviluppo di nuovi farmaci. Fino a quando non ci sarà un modo per sostituire la sperimentazione animale, il sacrificio di animali sperimentali sembra inevitabile in futuro.

#######

However, just because the life of laboratory animals is dignified does not mean that animal experiments should be stopped immediately. Until there is a way to replace animal testing, sacrifice of experimental animals seems inevitable in the future.
g_text_translate.ru:
Не будет преувеличением сказать, что удивительные достижения, достигнутые сегодня в области медицины и науки, стали возможными благодаря принесению в жертву подопытных животных. Можно сказать, что подопытные животные внесли большой вклад в развитие человечества. Однако, с другой стороны, по мере распространения в обществе осознания того, что жизнь животных также достойна, увеличились голоса, утверждающие, что испытания на животных неэтичны. В соответствии с этим изменением восприятия был подготовлен Закон об экспериментальных животных, и каждый год проводилась поминальная служба в память об их жертве. Однако то, что жизнь лабораторных животных достойна, не означает, что эксперименты на животных должны быть немедленно прекращены. Это потому, что ясно, что это создаст огромные препятствия для продолжающихся исследований по лечению неизлечимых заболеваний или разработке новых лекарств. Пока не будет найден способ заменить испытания на животных, жертвование экспериментальных животных в будущем кажется неизбежным.

#######

It is no exaggeration to say that the amazing achievements achieved in the fields of medicine and science today were made possible by the sacrifice of experimental animals. It can be said that experimental animals have contributed greatly to the development of mankind. However, on the other hand, as the social awareness that animal life is also dignified has spread, voices arguing that animal testing is unethical have increased. In line with this change in perception, the Act on Experimental Animals was prepared, and a memorial service was held every year to commemorate their sacrifice. However, just because the life of laboratory animals is dignified does not mean that animal experiments should be stopped immediately. This is because it is clear that it will cause a huge hindrance to the ongoing research on treatment of incurable diseases or the development of new drugs. Until there is a way to replace animal testing, sacrifice of experimental animals seems inevitable in the future.

g_text_translate.pt:
Não é exagero dizer que as conquistas surpreendentes alcançadas hoje nos campos da medicina e da ciência foram possíveis graças ao sacrifício de animais experimentais. Pode-se dizer que os animais experimentais contribuíram muito para o desenvolvimento da humanidade. Contudo, por outro lado, à medida que se espalhou a consciência social de que a vida animal também é digna, aumentaram as vozes que argumentam que os testes em animais são antiéticos. Em linha com esta mudança de percepção, a Lei sobre Animais Experimentais foi preparada, e um serviço memorial foi realizado todos os anos para comemorar o seu sacrifício. No entanto, só porque a vida dos animais de laboratório é digna não significa que as experiências com animais devam ser interrompidas imediatamente. Isto porque é evidente que irá causar um enorme obstáculo à investigação em curso sobre o tratamento de doenças incuráveis ​​ou ao desenvolvimento de novos medicamentos. Até que haja uma forma de substituir os testes em animais, o sacrifício de animais experimentais parece inevitável no futuro.

g_text_translate.hi:
यह कहने में कोई अतिशयोक्ति नहीं है कि आज चिकित्सा और विज्ञान के क्षेत्र में जो अद्भुत उपलब्धियाँ हासिल हुई हैं, वे प्रायोगिक पशुओं के बलिदान के कारण ही संभव हुईं। यह कहा जा सकता है कि प्रायोगिक जानवरों ने मानव जाति के विकास में बहुत योगदान दिया है। हालाँकि, दूसरी ओर, जैसे-जैसे यह सामाजिक जागरूकता फैली है कि पशु जीवन भी सम्मानजनक है, जानवरों का परीक्षण अनैतिक है, यह तर्क देने वाली आवाज़ें बढ़ गई हैं। धारणा में इस बदलाव के अनुरूप, प्रायोगिक जानवरों पर अधिनियम तैयार किया गया था, और उनके बलिदान को मनाने के लिए हर साल एक स्मारक सेवा आयोजित की गई थी। हालाँकि, सिर्फ इसलिए कि प्रयोगशाला जानवरों का जीवन सम्मानजनक है इसका मतलब यह नहीं है कि जानवरों पर प्रयोग तुरंत बंद कर दिया जाना चाहिए। ऐसा इसलिए क्योंकि यह स्पष्ट है कि इससे लाइलाज बीमारियों के इलाज या नई दवाओं के विकास पर चल रहे शोध में भारी बाधा उत्पन्न होगी। जब तक पशु परीक्षण को प्रतिस्थापित करने का कोई तरीका नहीं है, भविष्य में प्रायोगिक पशुओं का बलिदान अपरिहार्य लगता है।

g_text_translate.tr:
Bugün tıp ve bilim alanında elde edilen inanılmaz başarıların, deney hayvanlarının fedakarlığıyla mümkün olduğunu söylemek abartı olmaz. Deney hayvanlarının insanlığın gelişimine büyük katkı sağladığı söylenebilir. Ancak diğer yandan hayvan yaşamının da onurlu olduğu yönündeki toplumsal farkındalık yayıldıkça hayvanlar üzerinde yapılan testlerin etik olmadığını savunan sesler de arttı. Bu algı değişikliği doğrultusunda Deney Hayvanları Kanunu hazırlandı ve her yıl fedakarlıklarının anısına anma töreni düzenlendi. Ancak laboratuvar hayvanlarının yaşamının onurlu olması, hayvan deneylerinin derhal durdurulması gerektiği anlamına gelmiyor. Çünkü tedavisi mümkün olmayan hastalıkların tedavisi veya yeni ilaçların geliştirilmesi konusunda devam eden araştırmalara büyük bir engel oluşturacağı açıktır. Hayvan deneylerinin yerini alabilecek bir yol bulununcaya kadar gelecekte deney hayvanlarının feda edilmesi kaçınılmaz görünüyor.

#######

It is no exaggeration to say that the amazing achievements achieved in the fields of medicine and science today were made possible by the sacrifice of experimental animals. It can be said that experimental animals have contributed greatly to the development of mankind. However, on the other hand, as the social awareness that animal life is also dignified has spread, voices arguing that animal testing is unethical have increased. In line with this change in perception, the Act on Experimental Animals was prepared, and a memorial service was held every year to commemorate their sacrifice. However, just because the life of laboratory animals is dignified does not mean that animal experiments should be stopped immediately. This is because it is clear that it will cause a huge hindrance to the ongoing research on treatment of incurable diseases or the development of new drugs. Until there is a way to replace animal testing, sacrifice of experimental animals seems inevitable in the future.

explain.vi:
Chọn mục đích người viết viết bài viết này.
1. Để đưa ra sự cần thiết của thí nghiệm trên động vật và chính đáng hóa nó
2. Để chỉ trích vấn đề đạo đức trong thí nghiệm động vật hiện tại
3. Để làm rõ việc động vật đóng góp vào sự phát triển của nhân loại
4. Để giải thích kiến thức nền tảng mà những người thực hiện thí nghiệm trên động vật phải có
--------------------
정당화하다: Chính đáng hóa
필요성: Tính cần thiết
어쩔 수 없다: Không thể khác được

V + (으)ㄹ 수 없다: Không thể.

Bài viết đưa ra kết luận rằng không thể ngừng thí nghiệm động vật và đưa ra các lý do, tức là đang chính đáng hóa nó.
explain.en:
Choose the purpose of the writer of this paragraph.
1. To bring out the necessity of animal experimentation and legitimize it
2. To criticize the ethical issue of current animal experimentation
3. To clarify how animals contribute to the development of mankind
4. To explain the background knowledge that people doing experiments on animals must have
--------------------
<g>정당화하다:</g> Justify
<g>필요성:</g> Necessity
<g>어쩔 수 없다:</g> Cannot be different

<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 없다:</g> Cannot.

The paragraph concludes that animal experimentation cannot be stopped and gives reasons, i.e. is legitimizing it.

2. Critiquer la question éthique de l'expérimentation animale actuelle
3. Clarifier comment les animaux contribuent au développement de l'humanité
4. Expliquer les connaissances de base que les personnes effectuant des expériences sur des animaux doivent avoir
--------------------
<g>정당화하다:</g>Justifier
<g>필요성:</g>Nécessité
<g>어쩔 수 없다:</g>Ne peut pas être différent

<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 없다:</g>Ne peux pas.

Le paragraphe conclut que l'expérimentation animale ne peut pas être arrêtée et donne des raisons, c'est-à-dire qu'il la légitime.

explain.pt:
Escolha o correto para preencher ( ).
1. Se a compreensão da dignidade da vida não é pressuposta
2. Se a consciência social sobre o bem-estar animal não aumentar
3. Desde que os testes em animais não sejam utilizados para fins comerciais
4. Até que haja uma maneira de substituir os testes em animais
--------------------
<g>대체하다:</g>Para alternar
<g>방안:</g>Planejar, orientar, medir

O parágrafo afirma que atualmente não é possível interromper os testes em animais porque ainda são necessários. Portanto, no futuro não poderemos fazer nada se não houver alternativa.

#######

Choose the correct one to fill in ( ).
1. If the understanding of the dignity of life is not presupposed
2. If social awareness of animal welfare does not increase
3. As long as animal testing is not used for commercial purposes
4. Until there is a way to replace animal testing
--------------------
<g>대체하다:</g> To alternate
<g>방안:</g> Plan, way, measure

The paragraph states that it is currently not possible to stop testing on animals because it is still necessary. So in the future we will not be able to do anything if there is no alternative.
explain.hi:
( ) भरने के लिए सही विकल्प चुनें।
1. यदि जीवन की गरिमा का बोध पूर्वकल्पित नहीं है
2. यदि पशु कल्याण के प्रति सामाजिक जागरूकता नहीं बढ़ती है
3. जब तक पशु परीक्षण का उपयोग व्यावसायिक उद्देश्यों के लिए नहीं किया जाता है
4. जब तक पशु परीक्षण को बदलने का कोई तरीका नहीं आ जाता
------------------------
<g>대체하다:</g>वैकल्पिक करना
<g>방안:</g>योजना, रास्ता, उपाय

पैराग्राफ में कहा गया है कि जानवरों पर परीक्षण रोकना फिलहाल संभव नहीं है क्योंकि यह अभी भी जरूरी है। अतः विकल्प न होने पर भविष्य में हम कुछ नहीं कर पायेंगे।

explain.tr:
Doldurmak için doğru olanı seçin ( ).
1. Yaşamın onuru anlayışı önkoşul değilse
2. Hayvan refahı konusunda toplumsal farkındalık artmazsa
3. Hayvan deneyleri ticari amaçlarla kullanılmadığı sürece
4. Hayvanlar üzerinde yapılan testlerin yerini alacak bir yol bulunana kadar
--------------------
<g>대체하다:</g>Alternatif olarak
<g>방안:</g>Planla, yol göster, ölç

Paragrafta, hayvanlar üzerinde yapılan testlerin durdurulmasının şu anda mümkün olmadığı, çünkü bunun hala gerekli olduğu belirtiliyor. Yani gelecekte alternatif olmazsa hiçbir şey yapamayacağız.

#######

The paragraph states that it is currently not possible to stop testing on animals because it is still necessary. So in the future we will not be able to do anything if there is no alternative.

general.g_text:
작년 여름에 아들은 한 색시를 만나 본 일이 있다. 그 애면, 저두 싫다구는 않겠지. 이제 이놈이 들어오거든 단단히 따져 보리라....... 그리고 어머니는 어느 틈엔가 손주 자식을 눈앞에 그려 보기조차 한다. 
아들은 그러나 돌아와 채 어머니가 무어라고 말할 수 있기 전에, 입때 안 주무셨에요, 어서 주무세요, 그리고 자리옷으로 갈아입고는 책상 앞에 앉아, 원고지를 펴논다. 
그런 때 옆에서 무슨 말이든 하면, 아들은 언제나 불쾌한 표정을 지었다. 그래, 어머니는 가까스로, 늦었으니 어서 자거라, 그걸랑 낼 쓰구......, 한마디를 하고서 아들의 방을 나온다. 
‘얘기는 낼 아침에라두 허지.’
그러나 열한 점이나 오정에야 일어나는 아들은, 그대로 소리 없이 밥을 떠먹고는 나가 버렸다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Vào mùa hè năm ngoái, con trai tôi có gặp một cô gái. Cô gái đó tôi cũng không ghét. Bây giờ nếu nó đi vào thì tôi sẽ gạn hỏi gay gắt. Và một lúc nào đó, mẹ còn vẽ ra cả con cháu ngay trước mắt.
Thế nhưng con trai tôi trở về, trước khi mẹ nói gì đó, nó đã hỏi mẹ chưa ngủ ạ, mẹ đi ngủ đi, rồi thay đồ và ngồi vào bàn làm việc, mở giấy ra.
Những lúc như thế, dù cho có nói gì bên cạnh, con trai cũng luôn tỏ vẻ khó chịu. Mẹ bảo được rồi, đủ rồi, muộn rồi đi ngủ đi, cái đó mai viết... rồi ra khỏi phòng con trai.
"Chuyện thì để mai nói."
Nhưng con trai tôi dậy lúc 11 hay 12 giờ, cứ ăn cơm mà không nói tiếng nào rồi đi ra ngoài mất.
g_text_translate.en:
Last summer, the son met a girl. If it's that kid, the mother will never say she don't like her. Now, when the son comes in, she will check it out.... And the mother even draws her grandchildren in front of her eyes at some point.
The son, however, comes back and before his mother can say anything, he says "you haven't slept, go to sleep", and changes into bedclothes, sits at the desk, opens the manuscript.
When the mother said anything next to him at such a time, the son always had a displeased expression on his face. The mother approaches and says "Okay, it's late, go to sleep, write that tomorrow" .... and then leaves the son's room.
'Things will have to be told tomorrow.'
However, the son, who wakes up only at the eleventh or noon, ate his meal without a sound and left.
g_text_translate.fr:
L'été dernier, le fils a rencontré une fille. Si c'est cet enfant, la mère ne dira jamais qu'elle ne l'aime pas. Maintenant, quand le fils entrera, elle vérifiera... Et la mère dessine même ses petits-enfants devant ses yeux à un moment donné.
Le fils, cependant, revient et avant que sa mère ne puisse dire quoi que ce soit, il dit "tu n'as pas dormi, va dormir", et se transforme en draps, s'assied au bureau, ouvre le manuscrit.
Quand la mère disait quelque chose à côté de lui à un tel moment, le fils avait toujours une expression mécontente sur son visage. La mère s'approche et dit "D'accord, il est tard, va te coucher, écris ça demain" .... puis quitte la chambre du fils.
« Il faudra dire les choses demain.
Cependant, le fils, qui ne se réveille qu'au onze ou à midi, a mangé son repas sans un bruit et est parti.

#######

Last summer, the son met a girl. If it's that kid, the mother will never say she don't like her. Now, when the son comes in, she will check it out.... And the mother even draws her grandchildren in front of her eyes at some point.
The son, however, comes back and before his mother can say anything, he says "you haven't slept, go to sleep", and changes into bedclothes, sits at the desk, opens the manuscript.
When the mother said anything next to him at such a time, the son always had a displeased expression on his face. The mother approaches and says "Okay, it's late, go to sleep, write that tomorrow" .... and then leaves the son's room.
'Things will have to be told tomorrow.'
However, the son, who wakes up only at the eleventh or noon, ate his meal without a sound and left.
g_text_translate.es:
El verano pasado, el hijo conoció a una chica. Si es ese niño, la madre nunca dirá que no le gusta. Ahora, cuando entre el hijo, lo comprobará... Y la madre incluso dibuja a sus nietos frente a sus ojos en algún momento.
El hijo, sin embargo, regresa y antes de que su madre pueda decir algo, le dice "no has dormido, vete a dormir", y se pone ropa de cama, se sienta en el escritorio, abre el manuscrito.
Cuando la madre decía algo junto a él en ese momento, el hijo siempre tenía una expresión de disgusto en su rostro. La madre se acerca y le dice "Está bien, es tarde, vete a dormir, escribe eso mañana".... y luego sale de la habitación del hijo.
Habrá que decir las cosas mañana.
Sin embargo, el hijo, que se despierta solo a las once o al mediodía, comió sin hacer ruido y se fue.

#######

g_text_translate.id:
Musim panas lalu, sang putra bertemu dengan seorang gadis. Jika anak itu, ibu tidak akan pernah mengatakan dia tidak menyukainya. Sekarang, ketika putranya masuk, dia akan memeriksanya.... Dan sang ibu bahkan menggambar cucu-cucunya di depan matanya di beberapa titik.
Putranya, bagaimanapun, kembali dan sebelum ibunya dapat mengatakan apa-apa, dia berkata "kamu belum tidur, pergi tidur", dan berganti ke seprai, duduk di meja, membuka naskah.
Ketika sang ibu mengatakan sesuatu di sebelahnya pada saat seperti itu, putranya selalu memiliki ekspresi tidak senang di wajahnya. Sang ibu mendekat dan berkata "Oke, sudah malam, tidur, tulis besok" .... lalu meninggalkan kamar putranya.
"Banyak hal harus diberitahukan besok."
Namun, putranya, yang baru bangun pada jam sebelas atau siang hari, memakan makanannya tanpa suara dan pergi.

#######

g_text_translate.ja:
去年の夏、息子は女の子に会いました。あの子なら、母親は絶対に嫌いなんて言わない。さて、息子が入ってきたらチェックしてみようかな…。
しかし息子が帰ってきて、母親が何も言う前に「寝てないから寝ろ」と言い、寝具に着替え、机に座り、原稿を開く。
そんな時、横で母親が何か言うと、息子はいつも不機嫌そうな顔をしていた。お母さんが近づいてきて、「もう遅いから寝て、明日書いて」と言って……息子の部屋を出て行った。
「物事は明日言わなければならないでしょう。」
しかし、11時か正午にしか起きない息子は、音も立てずに食事をして立ち去った。

#######

g_text_translate.de:
Letzten Sommer lernte der Sohn ein Mädchen kennen. Wenn es dieses Kind ist, wird die Mutter niemals sagen, dass sie es nicht mag. Jetzt, wenn der Sohn reinkommt, wird sie nachsehen.... Und die Mutter malt sogar irgendwann ihre Enkelkinder vor Augen.
Der Sohn kommt jedoch zurück und bevor seine Mutter etwas sagen kann, sagt er "Du hast nicht geschlafen, geh schlafen", zieht sich das Bettzeug an, setzt sich an den Schreibtisch, öffnet das Manuskript.
Wenn die Mutter in einer solchen Zeit etwas neben ihm sagte, hatte der Sohn immer einen unzufriedenen Ausdruck im Gesicht. Die Mutter kommt und sagt "Okay, es ist spät, geh schlafen, schreib das morgen" .... und verlässt dann das Zimmer des Sohnes.
"Die Dinge müssen morgen erzählt werden."
Der Sohn jedoch, der erst um elf Uhr oder mittags aufwacht, aß geräuschlos seine Mahlzeit und ging.

g_text_translate.zh-CN:
去年夏天，儿子认识了一个女孩。如果是那个孩子，妈妈绝对不会说不喜欢她的。现在，当儿子进来的时候，她会检查一下……母亲甚至在某个时候把她的孙子们拉到她的眼前。
儿子回来了，还没等妈妈说什么，就说“你还没睡，去睡吧”，换上被褥，坐在书桌前，打开手稿。
这种时候妈妈在旁边说什么，儿子脸上总是带着不悦的表情。母亲走近说：“好吧，时间不早了，睡吧，明天再写”……然后离开儿子的房间。
“事情必须在明天被告知。”
然而，十一点或中午才醒来的儿子，默默地吃完饭就走了。

g_text_translate.zh-TW:
去年夏天，兒子認識了一個女孩。如果是那個孩子，媽媽絕對不會說不喜歡她的。現在，當兒子進來的時候，她會檢查一下……母親甚至在某個時候把她的孫子們拉到她的眼前。
兒子回來了，還沒等媽媽說什麼，就說“你還沒睡，去睡吧”，換上被褥，坐在書桌前，打開手稿。
這種時候媽媽在旁邊說什麼，兒子臉上總是帶著不悅的表情。母親走近說：“好吧，時間不早了，睡吧，明天再寫”……然後離開兒子的房間。
“事情必須在明天被告知。”
然而，十一點或中午才醒來的兒子，默默地吃完飯就走了。

g_text_translate.it:
L'estate scorsa, il figlio ha incontrato una ragazza. Se è quel bambino, la madre non dirà mai che non le piace. Ora, quando il figlio entra, controllerà... E la madre a un certo punto disegna persino i suoi nipoti davanti ai suoi occhi.
Il figlio, però, torna e prima che la madre possa dire qualcosa, dice "non hai dormito, vai a dormire", si cambia le lenzuola, si siede alla scrivania, apre il manoscritto.
Quando la madre diceva qualcosa accanto a lui in un momento simile, il figlio aveva sempre un'espressione dispiaciuta sul viso. La madre si avvicina e dice "Va bene, è tardi, vai a dormire, scrivilo domani" .... e poi esce dalla stanza del figlio.
"Le cose dovranno essere dette domani."
Tuttavia, il figlio, che si sveglia solo all'undicesimo oa mezzogiorno, mangiò senza far rumore e se ne andò.

#######

g_text_translate.ru:
Прошлым летом сын познакомился с девушкой. Если это тот ребенок, мать никогда не скажет, что она ей не нравится. Теперь, когда придет сын, она проверит.... А мать даже внуков в какой-то момент рисует перед глазами.
Сын, однако, возвращается и, прежде чем мать успевает что-либо сказать, говорит: «Ты не спал, иди спать», переодевается в постельное белье, садится за стол, открывает рукопись.
Когда мать говорила что-нибудь рядом с ним в такое время, у сына всегда было недовольное выражение лица. Мать подходит и говорит "Ладно, уже поздно, иди спать, напиши это завтра"....и затем уходит из комнаты сына.
— Все придется рассказать завтра.
Однако сын, который просыпается только в одиннадцатое число или в полдень, бесшумно поел и ушел.

g_text_translate.th:
ฤดูร้อนที่แล้วลูกชายได้พบกับผู้หญิงคนหนึ่ง ถ้าเป็นเด็กคนนั้นแม่จะไม่มีวันบอกว่าไม่ชอบเธอ ทีนี้พอลูกชายเข้ามาก็จะลองดู....และแม่ถึงกับดึงหลานมาต่อหน้าต่อตาสักครั้ง
อย่างไรก็ตาม ลูกชายกลับมา และก่อนที่แม่ของเขาจะพูดอะไร เขาก็พูดว่า "ยังไม่ได้นอน ไปนอนซะ" แล้วเปลี่ยนชุดเครื่องนอน นั่งที่โต๊ะ เปิดต้นฉบับ
เมื่อแม่พูดอะไรอยู่ข้างๆ เขาในเวลานั้น ลูกชายก็มักจะแสดงสีหน้าไม่พอใจอยู่เสมอ ผู้เป็นแม่เดินเข้ามาบอกว่า "โอเค ดึกแล้ว ไปนอนเถอะ พรุ่งนี้เขียนว่า" ....แล้วออกจากห้องลูกชายไป
'เรื่องจะต้องบอกพรุ่งนี้'
อย่างไรก็ตาม ลูกชายที่ตื่นเพียงตอนสิบเอ็ดหรือเที่ยงเท่านั้น จึงรับประทานอาหารโดยไม่ส่งเสียงและจากไป

When the mother said anything next to him at such a time, the son always had a displeased expression on his face. The mother approaches and says "Okay, it's late, go to sleep, write that tomorrow" .... and then leaves the son's room.
'Things will have to be told tomorrow.'
However, the son, who wakes up only at the eleventh or noon, ate his meal without a sound and left.
g_text_translate.pt:
No verão passado, o filho conheceu uma garota. Se for aquela criança, a mãe nunca vai dizer que não gosta dela. Agora, quando o filho chegar, ela vai conferir.... E a mãe até desenha os netos na frente dos olhos em algum momento.
O filho, porém, volta e antes que a mãe possa dizer alguma coisa, ele diz "você não dormiu, vá dormir", veste a roupa de cama, senta-se à escrivaninha e abre o manuscrito.
Quando a mãe falava alguma coisa ao lado dele naquele momento, o filho sempre ficava com uma expressão de descontentamento no rosto. A mãe se aproxima e diz “Tudo bem, já é tarde, vai dormir, escreve isso amanhã”....e depois sai do quarto do filho.
'As coisas terão que ser contadas amanhã.'
Porém, o filho, que só acorda às onze ou ao meio-dia, comeu sem fazer barulho e foi embora.

#######

Last summer, the son met a girl. If it's that kid, the mother will never say she don't like her. Now, when the son comes in, she will check it out.... And the mother even draws her grandchildren in front of her eyes at some point.
The son, however, comes back and before his mother can say anything, he says "you haven't slept, go to sleep", and changes into bedclothes, sits at the desk, opens the manuscript.
When the mother said anything next to him at such a time, the son always had a displeased expression on his face. The mother approaches and says "Okay, it's late, go to sleep, write that tomorrow" .... and then leaves the son's room.
'Things will have to be told tomorrow.'
However, the son, who wakes up only at the eleventh or noon, ate his meal without a sound and left.
g_text_translate.hi:
पिछली गर्मियों में बेटे की मुलाकात एक लड़की से हुई। यदि यह वह बच्चा है, तो माँ कभी नहीं कहेगी कि वह उसे पसंद नहीं करती। अब, जब बेटा आएगा, तो वह इसकी जाँच करेगी.... और माँ कभी-कभी अपने पोते-पोतियों को भी अपनी आँखों के सामने खींच लेती है।
हालाँकि, बेटा वापस आता है और इससे पहले कि उसकी माँ कुछ कहे, वह कहता है, "आप सोई नहीं हैं, सो जाओ", और बिस्तर के कपड़े बदलकर, डेस्क पर बैठता है, पांडुलिपि खोलता है।
ऐसे समय में जब मां उसके आगे कुछ कहती तो बेटे के चेहरे पर हमेशा नाराजगी के भाव रहते। माँ पास आती है और कहती है "ठीक है, देर हो गई है, सो जाओ, कल लिखना" .... और फिर बेटे के कमरे से निकल जाती है।
'बात तो कल बतानी पड़ेगी।'
हालाँकि, बेटा, जो केवल ग्यारह बजे या दोपहर को उठता है, ने बिना आवाज़ किए अपना खाना खाया और चला गया।

#######

Last summer, the son met a girl. If it's that kid, the mother will never say she don't like her. Now, when the son comes in, she will check it out.... And the mother even draws her grandchildren in front of her eyes at some point.
The son, however, comes back and before his mother can say anything, he says "you haven't slept, go to sleep", and changes into bedclothes, sits at the desk, opens the manuscript.
When the mother said anything next to him at such a time, the son always had a displeased expression on his face. The mother approaches and says "Okay, it's late, go to sleep, write that tomorrow" .... and then leaves the son's room.
'Things will have to be told tomorrow.'
However, the son, who wakes up only at the eleventh or noon, ate his meal without a sound and left.
g_text_translate.tr:
Geçen yaz oğlu bir kızla tanıştı. Eğer o çocuksa annesi asla ondan hoşlanmadığını söylemez. Artık oğlu gelince bakacak.... Hatta anne bir ara torunlarını da gözlerinin önüne çiziyor.
Ancak oğul geri gelir ve annesi bir şey söyleyemeden "uyumadın, uyu" der ve üzerini giyinip masaya oturur ve müsveddeyi açar.
Böyle bir anda anne yanında bir şey söylediğinde oğlunun yüzünde hep hoşnutsuz bir ifade olurdu. Anne yaklaşıp "Tamam, geç oldu, git uyu, bunu yarın yaz" der ve oğlunun odasından çıkar.
'Her şeyin yarın anlatılması gerekecek.'
Ancak ancak saat onbirde veya öğlen uyanan oğul, hiç ses çıkarmadan yemeğini yiyip gitti.

#######

Last summer, the son met a girl. If it's that kid, the mother will never say she don't like her. Now, when the son comes in, she will check it out.... And the mother even draws her grandchildren in front of her eyes at some point.
The son, however, comes back and before his mother can say anything, he says "you haven't slept, go to sleep", and changes into bedclothes, sits at the desk, opens the manuscript.
When the mother said anything next to him at such a time, the son always had a displeased expression on his face. The mother approaches and says "Okay, it's late, go to sleep, write that tomorrow" .... and then leaves the son's room.
'Things will have to be told tomorrow.'
However, the son, who wakes up only at the eleventh or noon, ate his meal without a sound and left.

general.g_text:
그런데 이제 숫자 일(1)의 영향력이 예전 같지 않다. 한 개의 질문에 한 개의 정답만 있던 시절이 가고 ‘왜 정답이 한 개여야 하나?’ 하 반문이 많아졌다. 언젠가부터 흥부는 게을러서 못살고 놀부는 부지런해서 부자가 되었다는 새로운 해석이 등장했다. 부지런한 개미는 일만 하다 골병이 들고 베짱이는 노래를 부르며 삶을 즐겼다고 보는 시각도 이와 비슷하다. 
이렇게 되면 하나의 틀을 강요당하며 억압 받는 일이 줄어 좋기는 하지만 그만큼 복잡해진 세상도 감당해야 한다. (        ) 신경 쓸 일이 많아지게 된다. 그러나 그 복잡함은 더 많은 기회와 가능성의 문을 열어 준다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Nhưng dạo này ảnh hưởng của số một (1) không còn như trước đây. Thời kì mà một câu hỏi chỉ có một câu trả lời đúng đã qua, ngày càng nhiều câu hỏi lại "tại sao số đáp án đúng phải là một?". Từ lúc nào đó đã có cách giải thích mới mẻ về việc về Heung Bu lười biếng nên không sống được còn Nol Bu chăm chỉ nên trở nên giàu có. Nó cũng giống với góc nhìn rằng chú kiến cần cù chỉ làm việc thì mắc bệnh nan y còn châu chấu thì vừa hát vừa tận hưởng cuộc sống. 
Nếu như thế này, việc bị gán ghép vào một khung nào đó và bị áp bức cũng giảm đi nên đây là điều tốt, nhưng chúng ta cũng phải giải quyết một thế giới phức tạp hơn.  (        ) những việc cần để ý cũng nhiều hơn. Tuy nhiên sự phức tạp đó cũng mở ra nhiều cánh cửa cơ hội và khả năng hơn.
g_text_translate.en:
But now the influence of the number one (1) is not what it used to be. Gone are the days when there was only one correct answer to one question, and the number of counter-answers to ‘Why should there be only one correct answer?’ is rising. From one day on, a new interpretation emerged that Heungbu could not live because he was lazy and Nolbu became rich because he was diligent. The view that the industrious ants only work, but have a serious health problem, and the view that the grasshopper enjoys life by singing are also similar.
In this way, it is good to be forced into a single frame and less oppressed, but we have to deal with the more complex world. The sense of stability given by one correct answer disappears, and there are many things to be concerned about. But its complexity opens the door to more opportunities and possibilities.
g_text_translate.fr:
Mais maintenant l'influence du numéro un (1) n'est plus ce qu'elle était. L'époque où il n'y avait qu'une seule bonne réponse à une question est révolue et le nombre de contre-réponses à "Pourquoi devrait-il n'y avoir qu'une seule bonne réponse?" est en augmentation. A partir d'un jour, une nouvelle interprétation a émergé selon laquelle Heungbu ne pouvait pas vivre parce qu'il était paresseux et Nolbu est devenu riche parce qu'il était diligent. L'opinion selon laquelle les fourmis industrieuses ne font que travailler, mais ont un grave problème de santé, et l'opinion selon laquelle la sauterelle profite de la vie en chantant sont également similaires.
De cette façon, c'est bien d'être enfermé dans un cadre unique et moins opprimé, mais nous devons faire face à un monde plus complexe. Le sentiment de stabilité donné par une seule réponse correcte disparaît et il y a beaucoup de choses à craindre. Mais sa complexité ouvre la porte à plus d'opportunités et de possibilités.

#######

g_text_translate.es:
Pero ahora la influencia del número uno (1) ya no es la que era. Atrás quedaron los días en que solo había una respuesta correcta a una pregunta, y la cantidad de contra-respuestas a "¿Por qué debería haber solo una respuesta correcta?" está aumentando. A partir de un día, surgió una nueva interpretación de que Heungbu no podía vivir porque era perezoso y Nolbu se hizo rico porque era diligente. La opinión de que las laboriosas hormigas solo trabajan, pero tienen un grave problema de salud, y la opinión de que el saltamontes disfruta de la vida cantando también son similares.
De esta manera, es bueno verse obligado a estar en un marco único y menos oprimido, pero tenemos que lidiar con el mundo más complejo. La sensación de estabilidad que da una respuesta correcta desaparece y hay muchas cosas de las que preocuparse. Pero su complejidad abre la puerta a más oportunidades y posibilidades.

g_text_translate.id:
Tapi sekarang pengaruh nomor satu (1) sudah tidak seperti dulu lagi. Lewatlah sudah hari-hari ketika hanya ada satu jawaban yang benar untuk satu pertanyaan, dan jumlah jawaban balik untuk 'Mengapa hanya ada satu jawaban yang benar?' meningkat. Sejak saat itu muncul interpretasi baru bahwa Heungbu tidak bisa hidup karena malas dan Nolbu menjadi kaya karena rajin. Pandangan bahwa semut rajin hanya bekerja, tetapi memiliki masalah kesehatan yang serius, dan pandangan bahwa belalang menikmati hidup dengan bernyanyi juga serupa.
Dengan cara ini, baik untuk dipaksa menjadi satu bingkai dan tidak terlalu tertindas, tetapi kita harus berurusan dengan dunia yang lebih kompleks. Rasa stabilitas yang diberikan oleh satu jawaban yang benar menghilang, dan ada banyak hal yang perlu dikhawatirkan. Tetapi kompleksitasnya membuka pintu ke lebih banyak peluang dan kemungkinan.

g_text_translate.ja:
しかし今、ナンバーワン (1) の影響力は以前ほどではありません。 1つの質問に1つの正解しかなかった時代は終わり、「なぜ正解は1つしかないのか」という反論が増えています。ある日から、フンブは怠け者だから生きられず、ノルブは勤勉だから金持ちになったという新しい解釈が生まれました。勤勉なアリは働くだけで深刻な健康問題を抱えているという見方や、バッタが鳴き声で生活を楽しんでいるという見方も似ています。
このように、単一のフレームに押し込まれて抑圧されないのは良いことですが、より複雑な世界に対処する必要があります。 1回の正解で得られる安定感がなくなり、気になることが多々あります。しかし、その複雑さは、より多くの機会と可能性への扉を開きます。

#######

g_text_translate.de:
Aber jetzt ist der Einfluss der Nummer eins (1) nicht mehr so ​​​​wie früher. Vorbei sind die Zeiten, in denen es auf eine Frage nur eine richtige Antwort gab und die Zahl der Gegenantworten auf „Warum sollte es nur eine richtige Antwort geben?“ steigt. Von einem Tag an tauchte eine neue Interpretation auf, dass Heungbu nicht leben konnte, weil er faul war, und Nolbu reich wurde, weil er fleißig war. Auch die Ansicht, dass die fleißigen Ameisen nur arbeiten, aber ein ernsthaftes Gesundheitsproblem haben, und die Ansicht, dass die Heuschrecke das Leben durch Singen genießt, sind ähnlich.
Auf diese Weise ist es gut, in einen einzigen Rahmen gezwungen und weniger unterdrückt zu werden, aber wir müssen uns mit der komplexeren Welt auseinandersetzen. Das Gefühl der Stabilität, das durch eine richtige Antwort vermittelt wird, verschwindet, und es gibt viele Dinge, über die man sich Sorgen machen muss. Aber seine Komplexität öffnet die Tür zu mehr Chancen und Möglichkeiten.

#######

The view that the industrious ants only work, but have a serious health problem, and the view that the grasshopper enjoys life by singing are also similar.
In this way, it is good to be forced into a single frame and less oppressed, but we have to deal with the more complex world. The sense of stability given by one correct answer disappears, and there are many things to be concerned about. But its complexity opens the door to more opportunities and possibilities.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
但现在一号（1）的影响力已经不如从前了。一个问题只有一个正确答案的日子已经一去不复返了，而“为什么只有一个正确答案？”的反答案数量正在增加。从某一天开始，出现了一种新的解释，兴富因为懒惰而活不下去，诺尔布因为勤奋而富有。勤劳的蚂蚁只干活，却有严重的健康问题，蚱蜢靠歌声享受生活的观点也类似。
这样一来，被逼成一个单一的框架，少受压迫固然好，但我们要应对更复杂的世界。一个正确答案所带来的稳定感消失了，需要关心的事情很多。但它的复杂性为更多机会和可能性打开了大门。

#######

g_text_translate.zh-TW:
但現在一號（1）的影響力已經不如從前了。一個問題只有一個正確答案的日子已經一去不復返了，而“為什麼只有一個正確答案？”的反答案數量正在增加。從某一天開始，出現了一種新的解釋，興富因為懶惰而活不下去，諾爾布因為勤奮而富有。勤勞的螞蟻只幹活，卻有嚴重的健康問題，蚱蜢靠歌聲享受生活的觀點也類似。
這樣一來，被逼成一個單一的框架，少受壓迫固然好，但我們要應對更複雜的世界。一個正確答案所帶來的穩定感消失了，需要關心的事情很多。但它的複雜性為更多機會和可能性打開了大門。

#######

But now the influence of the number one (1) is not what it used to be. Gone are the days when there was only one correct answer to one question, and the number of counter-answers to ‘Why should there be only one correct answer?’ is rising. From one day on, a new interpretation emerged that Heungbu could not live because he was lazy and Nolbu became rich because he was diligent. The view that the industrious ants only work, but have a serious health problem, and the view that the grasshopper enjoys life by singing are also similar.
In this way, it is good to be forced into a single frame and less oppressed, but we have to deal with the more complex world. The sense of stability given by one correct answer disappears, and there are many things to be concerned about. But its complexity opens the door to more opportunities and possibilities.
g_text_translate.it:
Ma ora l'influenza del numero uno (1) non è più quella di una volta. Sono finiti i giorni in cui c'era una sola risposta corretta a una domanda e il numero di contro-risposte a "Perché dovrebbe esserci una sola risposta corretta?" è in aumento. Da un giorno in poi emerse una nuova interpretazione secondo cui Heungbu non poteva vivere perché era pigro e Nolbu divenne ricco perché era diligente. Anche l'idea che le industriose formiche lavorino solo, ma hanno un serio problema di salute, e l'idea che la cavalletta si goda la vita cantando sono simili.
In questo modo è bene essere costretti in un unico frame e meno oppressi, ma bisogna fare i conti con il mondo più complesso. Il senso di stabilità dato da una risposta corretta scompare e ci sono molte cose di cui preoccuparsi. Ma la sua complessità apre la porta a maggiori opportunità e possibilità.

#######

But now the influence of the number one (1) is not what it used to be. g_text_translate.ru:
Но сейчас влияние номера один (1) уже не то, что раньше. Прошли те времена, когда на один вопрос был только один правильный ответ, и количество встречных ответов на вопрос «Почему должен быть только один правильный ответ?» растет. С одного дня возникла новая интерпретация: Хынбу не мог жить, потому что был ленив, а Нолбу разбогател, потому что был прилежным. Схожи также точка зрения, что трудолюбивые муравьи только работают, но имеют серьезные проблемы со здоровьем, и точка зрения, что кузнечик наслаждается жизнью пением.
Таким образом, хорошо, когда нас загоняют в единые рамки и меньше угнетают, но нам приходится иметь дело с более сложным миром. Ощущение стабильности, которое дает один правильный ответ, исчезает, и есть много вещей, о которых стоит беспокоиться. Но его сложность открывает двери для большего количества возможностей и возможностей.

g_text_translate.pt:
Mas agora a influência do número um (1) não é mais o que costumava ser. Longe vão os dias em que havia apenas uma resposta correta para uma pergunta, e o número de contra-respostas para “Por que deveria haver apenas uma resposta correta?” A partir de um dia surgiu uma nova interpretação de que Heungbu não poderia viver porque era preguiçoso e Nolbu enriqueceu porque era diligente. A visão de que as formigas industriosas apenas trabalham, mas têm um sério problema de saúde, e a visão de que o gafanhoto aproveita a vida cantando também são semelhantes.
Desta forma, é bom sermos forçados a um quadro único e menos oprimidos, mas temos que lidar com um mundo mais complexo. A sensação de estabilidade proporcionada por uma resposta correta desaparece e há muitas coisas com que nos preocupar. Mas a sua complexidade abre portas para mais oportunidades e possibilidades.

g_text_translate.hi:
लेकिन अब अंक एक (1) का प्रभाव पहले जैसा नहीं रहा। वे दिन गए जब एक प्रश्न का केवल एक ही सही उत्तर होता था, और 'केवल एक ही सही उत्तर क्यों होना चाहिए?' के प्रतिउत्तरों की संख्या बढ़ रही है। एक दिन से, एक नई व्याख्या सामने आई कि हेंगबू जीवित नहीं रह सका क्योंकि वह आलसी था और नोल्बू अमीर बन गया क्योंकि वह मेहनती था। यह विचार कि मेहनती चींटियाँ केवल काम करती हैं, लेकिन उन्हें गंभीर स्वास्थ्य समस्या होती है, और यह विचार कि टिड्डा गाना गाकर जीवन का आनंद लेता है, भी समान हैं।
इस तरह, एक ही ढाँचे में बंधे रहना और कम उत्पीड़ित होना अच्छा है, लेकिन हमें अधिक जटिल दुनिया से निपटना होगा। एक सही उत्तर से मिली स्थिरता की भावना गायब हो जाती है और चिंता करने लायक कई चीजें होती हैं। लेकिन इसकी जटिलता अधिक अवसरों और संभावनाओं के द्वार खोलती है।

#######

g_text_translate.tr:
Ama artık bir (1) sayısının etkisi eskisi gibi değil. Bir sorunun tek doğru cevabının olduğu günler geride kaldı ve ‘Neden tek doğru cevap olsun ki?’ sorusuna verilen karşı cevapların sayısı artıyor. Bir günden itibaren Heungbu'nun tembel olduğu için yaşayamadığı, Nolbu'nun ise çalışkan olduğu için zengin olduğu yönünde yeni bir yorum ortaya çıktı. Çalışkan karıncaların sadece çalıştıkları ancak ciddi sağlık sorunları yaşadıkları görüşü ile çekirgenin şarkı söyleyerek hayatın tadını çıkardığı görüşü de benzerdir.
Bu sayede tek bir çerçeveye sıkışıp daha az ezilmek güzel ama daha karmaşık dünyayla da uğraşmak zorundayız. Tek bir doğru cevabın verdiği istikrar duygusu ortadan kalkar ve endişelenecek pek çok şey ortaya çıkar. Ancak karmaşıklığı daha fazla fırsat ve olasılığa kapı açıyor.

#######

But now the influence of the number one (1) is not what it used to be. explain.vi:
Nội dung phía trước bài viết này là gì?
1. Vấn đề ép buộc đáp án đúng của thời đại.
2. Ý nghĩa thời đại đa dạng của số một.
3. Hình ảnh của thời đại được trị vì bởi một tiêu chuẩn 
4. Bối cảnh thời đại nơi nhiều đáp án đúng xuất hiện
--------------------
영향력: Sức ảnh hưởng
지배하다: Trị vì, cai trị

Câu đầu tiên có "그런데" thể hiện ý nghĩa câu này có phần tương phản với câu phía trước. Trước đây chỉ có một tiêu chuẩn nhưng bây giờ số một không còn sức ảnh hưởng như trước.
explain.en:
What is the content before this paragraph?
1. Problems in the age of forcing answers
2. Various historical meanings of number one
3. A time when one standard ruled
4. The historical background in which various answers were created
--------------------
<g>영향력:</g> Influence
<g>지배하다:</g> To rule

The first sentence with <g>"그런데"</g> shows that the meaning of this sentence is somewhat contrasted with the previous sentence. Previously there was only one standard but now number one is no longer as influential as before.
